name: Booking_Summary
description: This tool belongs to the BookingAPI, which provides access to Booking.com travel services including hotels, flights, car rentals, attractions, and taxis. Tool description: Retrieve a summary of the booking details for a specific vehicle. EndPoint: /api/v1/cars/bookingSummary

search_key.description: `search_key` can be retrieved from `api/v1/cars/searchCarRentals`**(Search Car Rentals)** endpoint in **Car Rental** collection as `search_key`.

vehicle_id.description: Vehicle ID. `vehicle_id` can be retrieved from `api/v1/cars/searchCarRentals`**(Search Car Rentals)** endpoint in **Car Rental** collection as `vehicle_id` inside `search_results` object.

status.description: Whether the API call was successful

name: Get_Attraction_Details
description: This tool belongs to the BookingAPI, which provides access to Booking.com travel services including hotels, flights, car rentals, attractions, and taxis. Tool description: Search the attraction detail information. EndPoint: /api/v1/attraction/getAttractionDetails

slug.description: `slug` can be retrieved from `api/v1/attraction/searchLocation`**(Search Attraction Location)** endpoint in **Attraction** collection as `productSlug ` inside `products` or `destinations`.

status.description: Whether the API call was successful

name: Get_Availability
description: This tool belongs to the BookingAPI, which provides access to Booking.com travel services including hotels, flights, car rentals, attractions, and taxis. Tool description: Check if tickets for tourist attractions are available. EndPoint: /api/v1/attraction/getAvailability

slug.description: `slug` can be retrieved from `api/v1/attraction/searchLocation`**(Search Attraction Location)** endpoint in **Attraction** collection as `productSlug ` inside `products` or `destinations`.

date.description: The availability of the data. DATE (YYYY-MM-DD)

status.description: Whether the API call was successful

name: Get_Availability_Calendar
description: This tool belongs to the BookingAPI, which provides access to Booking.com travel services including hotels, flights, car rentals, attractions, and taxis. Tool description: Search the availability calendar for a specific attraction. EndPoint: /api/v1/attraction/getAvailabilityCalendar

id.description: `id` can be retrieved from `api/v1/attraction/searchLocation`**(Search Attraction Location)** endpoint in **Attraction** collection as `productId` inside `products` or `destinations`.

status.description: Whether the API call was successful

name: Get_Description_And_Info
description: This tool belongs to the BookingAPI, which provides access to Booking.com travel services including hotels, flights, car rentals, attractions, and taxis. Tool description: Retrieve the detailed description and information for a specific hotel. EndPoint: /api/v1/hotels/getDescriptionAndInfo

hotel_id.description:
`hotel_id` can be retrieved from `api/v1/hotels/searchHotels`**(Search Hotels)** or `api/v1/hotels/searchHotelsByCoordinates`**(Search Hotels By Coordinates
)** endpoint in **Hotels** collection.

status.description: Whether the API call was successful

name: Get_Filter
description: This tool belongs to the BookingAPI, which provides access to Booking.com travel services including hotels, flights, car rentals, attractions, and taxis. Tool description: Get the `categories_filter` parameter value for `Search_Hotels` function. EndPoint: /api/v1/hotels/getFilter

categories_filter.description:
`categories_filter` can be retrieved from `api/v1/hotels/getFilter`**(Get Filter)** endpoint in **Hotels** collection.

***Note: For the initial request, leave it blank.***

search_type.description: `search_type` can be retrieved from `api/v1/hotels/searchDestination`**(Search Hotel Destination)** endpoint in **hotel** collection.

children_age.description:
The number of **children**, including **infants**, who are **under 18**.
Example:
Child 1 Age = 8 months
Child 2 Age = 1 year
Child 3 Age = 17 years
Here is what the request parameter would look like:
`children_age: 0,1,17`

dest_id.description: `dest_id` can be retrieved from `api/v1/hotels/searchDestination`**(Search Hotel Destination)** endpoint in **Hotels** collection.

room_qty.description: The **number** of **rooms** that are required. The **default** value is set to **1**.

departure_date.description: The date of departure or check-out. DATE (YYYY-MM-DD)

arrival_date.description: The date on which you will arrive or check-in. DATE (YYYY-MM-DD)

adults.description: The **number** of guests who are **18 years** of age or **older**. The **default** value is set to **1**.

status.description: Whether the API call was successful

name: Get_Flight_Details
description: This tool belongs to the BookingAPI, which provides access to Booking.com travel services including hotels, flights, car rentals, attractions, and taxis. Tool description: Search the detail information of flights, include: baggage allowances, airline meals, ticket price breakdown (taxes, discounts, baseFare) and insurance prices, etc. EndPoint: /api/v1/flights/getFlightDetails

token.description: `token` can be retrieved from `api/v1/flights/searchFlights`**(Search Flights)** or `api/v1/flights/searchFlightsMultiStops`**(Search Flights Multi Stops)** endpoints in **Flights** collection as `token`.

status.description: Whether the API call was successful

EndPoint: /api/v1/hotels/getHotelReviewsSortOption

hotel_id.description:

status.description: Whether the API call was successful

name: Get_Min_Price
description: This tool belongs to the BookingAPI, which provides access to Booking.com travel services including hotels, flights, car rentals, attractions, and taxis. Tool description: Get the minimum price for flights. This API will return the lowest priced flights within 5 days before and after the query date. EndPoint: /api/v1/flights/getMinPrice

cabinClass.description: Search for flights that match the cabin class specified. Cabin call can be either ECONOMY, PREMIUM_ECONOMY, BUSINESS or FIRST.

fromId.description: **From/Departure** location **Id**. `fromId` can be retrieved from `api/v1/flights/searchDestination`**(Search Flight Location)** endpoint in **Flights** collection as `id`.

toId.description: **To/Arrival** location **Id**. `toId` can be retrieved from `api/v1/flights/searchDestination`**(Search Flight Location)** endpoint in **Flights** collection as `id`.

status.description: Whether the API call was successful

name: Get_Min_Price_Multi_Stops
description: This tool belongs to the BookingAPI, which provides access to Booking.com travel services including hotels, flights, car rentals, attractions, and taxis. Tool description: Get the minimum price for multi-stop flights. This API will return the lowest priced flights within 5 days before and after the query date. EndPoint: /api/v1/flights/getMinPriceMultiStops

cabinClass.description: Search for flights that match the cabin class specified. Cabin call can be either ECONOMY, PREMIUM_ECONOMY, BUSINESS or FIRST.

legs.description:
The legs must contain the fromId, toId and date in object format and must be passed in an array.
EXAMPLE:
[
  {
    'fromId': 'BOM.AIRPORT',
    'toId': 'AMD.AIRPORT',
    'date': '2024-05-25'
  },
…
]
Note: If there are multiple stops, there should be more leg objects in the array.

fromId.description: **From/Departure** location **Id**. `fromId` can be retrieved from `api/v1/flights/searchDestination`**(Search Flight Location)** endpoint in **Flights** collection as `id`.

toId.description: **To/Arrival** location **Id**. `toId` can be retrieved from `api/v1/flights/searchDestination`**(Search Flight Location)** endpoint in **Flights** collection as `id`.

status.description: Whether the API call was successful

longitude.description: Longitude of the searched location. `longitude` can be retrieved from `api/v1/meta/locationToLatLong`**(Location to Lat Long)** endpoint in **Meta** collection.

latitude.description: Latitude of the searched location. `latitude` can be retrieved from `api/v1/meta/locationToLatLong`**(Location to Lat Long)** endpoint in **Meta** collection.

status.description: Whether the API call was successful

drop_off_time.description:
Drop off time
Format: **HH:MM**
*Note: The format of time is 24 hours.* TIME (24-hour HH:MM)

drop_off_latitude.description: The drop off location's `latitude`. `drop_off_latitude` can be retrieved from `api/v1/cars/searchDestination`**(Search Car Location)** endpoint in **Car Rental** collection as `latitude` inside `coordinates` object.

sort.description: This parameter orders result by BEST, CHEAPEST or FASTEST flights.

fromId.description: **From/Departure** airports's location **Id**. `fromId` can be retrieved from `api/v1/flights/searchDestination`**(Search Flight Location)** endpoint in **Flights** collection as `id`.

cabinClass.description: Search for flights that match the cabin class specified. Cabin call can be either ECONOMY, PREMIUM_ECONOMY, BUSINESS or FIRST.

children.description:
The number of **children**, including **infants**, who are **under 18**.
Example:
Child 1 Age = 8 months
Child 2 Age = 1 year
Child 3 Age = 17 years

`children_age: 0,1,17`

toId.description: **To/Arrival** airports's location **Id**. `toId` can be retrieved from `api/v1/flights/searchDestination`**(Search Flight Location)** endpoint in **Flights** collection as `id`.

query.description: Names of locations, cities, districts, places, countries, counties etc.

name: Vehicle_Details
description: This tool belongs to the BookingAPI, which provides access to Booking.com travel services including hotels, flights, car rentals, attractions, and taxis. Tool description: Search the detail information of a car using `vehicle id`. EndPoint: /api/v1/cars/vehicleDetails

vehicle_id.description: Vehicle ID. `vehicle_id` can be retrieved from `api/v1/cars/searchCarRentals`**(Search Car Rentals)** endpoint in **Car Rental** collection as `vehicle_id` inside `search_results` object.

search_key.description: `search_key` can be retrieved from `api/v1/cars/searchCarRentals`**(Search Car Rentals)** endpoint in **Car Rental** collection as `search_key`.

status.description: Whether the API call was successful

name: Vehicle_Supplier_Details
description: This tool belongs to the BookingAPI, which provides access to Booking.com travel services including hotels, flights, car rentals, attractions, and taxis. Tool description: Search the detail information of a vehicle supplier using `vehicle id`. EndPoint: /api/v1/cars/vehicleSupplierDetails

vehicle_id.description: Vehicle ID. `vehicle_id` can be retrieved from `api/v1/cars/searchCarRentals`**(Search Car Rentals)** endpoint in **Car Rental** collection as `vehicle_id` inside `search_results` object.

status.description: Whether the API call was successful

name: Vehicle_Supplier_Ratings
description: This tool belongs to the BookingAPI, which provides access to Booking.com travel services including hotels, flights, car rentals, attractions, and taxis. Tool description: Retrieve ratings for the supplier of a specific vehicle. EndPoint: /api/v1/cars/vehicleSupplierRatings

vehicle_id.description: Vehicle ID. `vehicle_id` can be retrieved from `api/v1/cars/searchCarRentals`**(Search Car Rentals)** endpoint in **Car Rental** collection as `vehicle_id` inside `search_results` object.

search_key.description: `search_key` can be retrieved from `api/v1/cars/searchCarRentals`**(Search Car Rentals)** endpoint in **Car Rental** collection as `search_key`.

status.description: Whether the API call was successful

name: Vehicle_Supplier_Review
description: This tool belongs to the BookingAPI, which provides access to Booking.com travel services including hotels, flights, car rentals, attractions, and taxis. Tool description: Get the reviews for the supplier of a specific vehicle. EndPoint: /api/v1/cars/vehicleSupplierReview

vehicle_id.description: Vehicle ID. `vehicle_id` can be retrieved from `api/v1/cars/searchCarRentals`**(Search Car Rentals)** endpoint in **Car Rental** collection as `vehicle_id` inside `search_results` object.

search_key.description: `search_key` can be retrieved from `api/v1/cars/searchCarRentals`**(Search Car Rentals)** endpoint in **Car Rental** collection as `search_key`.

status.description: Whether the API call was successful
